title: carpolobia alba
intro: Carpolobia alba is a tropical plant species native to West Africa, also known as White Carpolobia, which belongs to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Carpolobia alba has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be used in herbal preparations like ointments and salves to treat skin conditions.
